title: Make C TX queue reads thread-safe
description: tx_queue_count, tx_queue_empty, and tx_queue_stats_get read shared queue state without locking despite the thread-safe API contract; POSIX mutations can race and cause undefined behavior. Also audit and propagate pthread_mutex_init/destroy failures. Redesign const/read API locking without unsafe casts, add concurrent host tests and sanitizer/thread-sanitizer validation.
close_reason: Redesigned tx_queue_count/empty/stats_get with proper mutex locking (no unsafe const casts), audited+propagated pthread_mutex_init/destroy failures (and Zephyr equiv), updated lora_l2 comment+added destroy call in deinit, added concurrent reader+mutator test, TSAN build support in CMake+test passes cleanly under -Werror. All tests 18/18. Fixed the x1h3 data race and ALL other findings from 3 review passes (compiler, TSAN, manual). No remaining issues.
